description: Binary pass/fail criteria for website performance optimization loop

criteria.name: cls_below_threshold
criteria.description: Cumulative Layout Shift must stay below 0.1

criteria.name: lcp_improving
criteria.description: Largest Contentful Paint must not increase vs baseline

criteria.name: visual_no_regression
criteria.description: Frontend-critic score must not decrease after changes

criteria.name: images_optimized
criteria.description: All images have width/height attributes and below-fold have loading=lazy

criteria.name: modern_image_format
criteria.description: Hero and large images use WebP or AVIF format

criteria.name: no_render_blocking_js
criteria.description: Non-critical JS has defer or async attribute

criteria.name: font_display_swap
criteria.description: Web fonts use font-display: swap or optional

criteria.name: preconnect_hints
criteria.description: Preconnect hints for external origins (CDN, fonts, analytics)
